task: place the square bread in the sink
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue plastic container with a yellow square bread inside sits on a wooden table. A white sink with a black basin is visible. The bread is a solid, flat object. STRATEGY - First, grasp the bread from the container. Then, transport it to the sink. Finally, place the bread inside the sink basin. Failure modes include dropping the bread during transport or misplacing it outside the sink. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the bread inside the container. Step 2: Grasp the bread from the container. Step 3: Transport the bread to the sink. Step 4: Place the bread inside the sink basin.
Goal: inside(yellow_bread, sink)
Scene: yellow_bread, blue_container, sink, table
Step 1: reach(yellow_bread)
  affordance_region: the yellow square bread inside the blue container
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_bread, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_bread) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_bread)
  affordance_region: the yellow square bread inside the blue container
  contact: holding(yellow_bread) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_bread)
Step 3: transport(yellow_bread -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink basin
  spatial: above(yellow_bread, sink, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_bread)
  done_when: above(yellow_bread, sink, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_bread -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink basin
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_bread, sink) [completion]; released(yellow_bread) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_bread) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_bread, sink) AND released(yellow_bread)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the yellow square bread inside the blue container
the yellow square bread inside the blue container
an empty area inside the sink basin
an empty area inside the sink basin
